name: title
description: Provide a concise, descriptive title for your project, adhering to NIH guidelines for clarity and simplicity.

name: significance
description: Explain the importance of the problem or critical barrier that your project addresses, and how it impacts human lives.

name: aims
description: Define the specific objectives of your research project, outlining the aims you plan to achieve to test your hypothesis.

name: innovation
description: Describe the novel aspects of your project and how it challenges or shifts current research or clinical practice paradigms.

name: researchPlan
description: Detail the strategies, methodologies, and analyses you plan to use to accomplish each aim of your project.

name: preliminaryResults
description: Provide any preliminary studies you have already done to substantiate and support the feasibility of your aims.

name: risksAndAlternativeApproaches
description: Identify potential risks and outline alternative strategies to achieve your aims in case of unexpected challenges.

name: clinicalTrials
description: Provide details on recruitment, retention, and inclusion of subjects if your project involves clinical trials.

name: progressReport
description: Provide a Progress Report as part of your Research Strategy, detailing previous aims, progress, and planned changes.
